set.body: .amatrix_bind_resident overwrites the residency registry entry for an object without first calling .amatrix_release_resident on the old key. If any object is rebound (second GPU push, handle transfer, backend switch), the first resident key K1 is silently orphaned <e2><80><94> registry points to K2, finalizer only drops K2, K1 leaks in device memory until process exit. Fix: release prior key before overwriting. Found by round 2 hunt amatrix-5y1, hunter 03.
set.title: .amatrix_bind_resident leaks prior key on rebind (residency.R:84-100)
